<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of phpunit/php-code-coverage. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace SebastianBergmann\CodeCoverage\Test\TestStatus; /** * @immutable */ final class Failure extends Known { public function isFailure(): true { return true; } public function asString(): string { return 'failure'; } }
